11.content: Do you want to be chase, or do you want to be his pet?
11.title: Chase

112.content: You walked through a forest of green. It was weird though, these definitely weren’t trees. Walking along you couldn’t shake the feeling that these were something that you’ve seen before. You stopped to inspect the giant green pillars that stretched up to about two times your height. Staring at your surroundings, you saw something that you definitely recognized. A rock. But it was so huge, even bigger than the giant pillars. “What on earth is going on” you said to yourself as you walked on. After about a minute of walking, you saw something in the mud. A paw print. But again, it was so big. Why was it so big? Suddenly it dawned on you, they weren’t big, you were small. How was this possible? You were trying to come up with some logical explanation, but you couldn’t think of any. Right then you heard a thundering sound in the distance. Stunned, you look around for the source of the sound. The sound grew closer with each passing second. A moment of realization dawned on you as you stared back at the paw print. Scared, you start looking for a place to hide but find none. The sound was clear now, a rhythmic thumping that you could only guess was the dog that left the paw print. There was nothing you could do, you simply stood there hoping not to get stepped on. Fortunately for you the thumping stopped and the dog’s shadow eclipsed you. Looking up you saw a dog with some kind of police hat and a uniform to go with it. The dog appeared to be a German Shepard puppy with dark brown and tan fur. “What is that?” The massive pup said.
112.title: Big pup

choices: He wants you to give him a paw massage
1122.content: In a moment of irrational thinking, you decided that perhaps you could climb up to a place where he could tell what you are. But as soon as you reached his paws he leans down and stares at you with a curious expression. “A human? Why are you so small?” The puppy asked. Relieved that you didn’t have to climb his paw, you answered back “I don’t know how I got this small, but please help me!” The dog stared at you for a moment before a smile spread on his face.
1122.title: The dog noticed you

11221.content: “Wh-Why are you looking at me like that?” You stuttered. Chase’s happy giggle scared you. Chase leaned down and opened his maw right in front of your eyes. The hot breath washed over you and you knew that this was not going to end well if you stayed put. What should you do?
11221.title: He hasn’t had lunch yet

choices: Accept your place as his pet
11222.content: “Okay little human” Chase said with a smirk. You stare up and try to remain calm as he chuckles to himself. “My name is Chase and you are my new pet!” Chase’s words send a chill down your spine as you try to figure a way out of this scenario. “So I want you to massage my paws, and make sure you get between the toes little human” Chase smugly lifted his paw right in front of your face.
11222.title: Paw massage

12.content: Marshall had a long day, he had been fighting fires left and right and just wanted an escape. He took off his uniform and decided today was as good a day as any to use his power. Something that he never mentioned to anyone in fear of being ridiculed, he actually had the power to will whatever he wanted into existence. Sometimes it was something helpful, but most of the time Marshall used it for his own pleasures. He remembered the day when he made a tiny city part of his paw pads, or the endless torment of tiny humans tasting sweat from them. He even played with a couple in his mouth for fun a few times. “Oh boy this’ll be fun” Marshall said going to a secluded spot where he could use his power.
12.title: Marshall

121.content: Marshall felt like he wanted to use just one human this time.
121.title: He summons a tiny human

13.content: Will you be play the role of Skye or will you play the role of a human?
13.title: Skye

choices: You bring the little girl to your puphouse
131.content: On every mission, you always saw a little girl at the window with a dreamy look on her face, like she wants to be something more. “She’s kinda cute, that little girl.” Skye said to Zuma. “Maybe you could bring her to your puphouse and you and me can talk with her.” Zuma suggested.
131.title: Skye.

choices: The little girl stays with them
1312.content: “Ok. I’ll do it.” Skye said. But Skye really didn’t feel comfortable doing this, but she didn’t want to let Zuma down. Luckily the little girl’s parents weren’t home, so she grabbed the little girl, covered her mouth with her paw, so she can’t scream, and the girl falls unconscious. Skye brings the little girl to her puphouse, and the girl wakes up. “Why would you just do that?” The little girl asked. “Zuma wanted to talk with you, and to be honest, I do too.” Skye explained. “About what?” The little girl asked. “About the feeling that you’re probably gonna end up in a bad situation.” Skye answered nervously.
1312.title: You bring the little girl to your puphouse

13123.content: “I don’t care if I end up in a bad situation, even ending up getting eaten by either you or Zuma. I just wanna be with you.” The little girl responded fiercely. “Ok, who do you wanna be with? Me or Zuma?” Skye asked.
13123.title: The little girl stays with them

151.content: Would you rather be Rubble, or the tiny human he plays with?
151.title: Rubble

choices: On the concrete next to a big green pup house
Inside a big green container (Rocky’s food bowl)
152.content:
You were a fan of the paw patrol and out of all the pups, you were a big fan of Rocky. You always wanted to meet them but were unable to since they were always busy with their missions. All that changed when you felt strangely tired one night and went to bed.

As you woke up you notice you were in an entirely different place. You woke up...
152.title: Rocky

choices: Rocky coming for a quick snack
Rocky knocking things down in his sleep
1522.content: “Ok. How did I get here?” I asked myself. Suddenly there was clattering coming, which is close to your vicinity. What was it?
1522.title: Inside a big green container (Rocky’s food bowl)

15221.content: As you looked up, you see Rocky lower his head near the bowl, and slurp you in his mouth, and he quickly swallows you down, unaware that the snack he just swallowed, was a small human in the wrong place at the wrong time. But he did rather think his little snack was tasty though.
15221.title: Rocky coming for a quick snack

153.content: Are Everest or her loving pet?
153.title: Everest

choices: Zuma has plans in store for you
1542.content: You’ve always seen the Paw Patrol help others out, but you didn’t really relate to any of the pups that you see outside your window, other than Zuma. You both really liked water. But you couldn’t get a chance to see him. You went off to sleep, still clinging to the dream that will never come true. You wake up next morning, in a place that’s oddly familiar. It’s Zuma’s puphouse. How did I get here? And why am I small? I screamed in my mind. “It’s ok. Nothing is gonna happen to you. Yet. Said Zuma who was standing in front of you. What does he want with you?
1542.title: Zuma

15422.content: “Hehe.” Zuma laughed as he picked you up with one paw and raised you above his head and opened his jaws. “No! No. No. No. No.” I said. “Why not little dude?” Zuma asked. “I never asked for this. All I wanted was to just see you.” I tried to explain. “And you did. And now you get to be a snack for your favorite pup.” Zuma replied, grinning. Zuma opened his jaws and dropped you inside, snapped his jaws shut, quickly gulped you down and went off to sleep. Guess he was right, now you’re just an expendable piece of meat for your favorite Paw Patrol member.
15422.title: Zuma wants a quick snack

1543.content: Like the bad type huh? Will you be Sweetie or the human?
1543.title: Sweetie

info.brief_description: Paw patrol characters play with you
info.description:
Choose a paw patrol character to be the master, as you be their micro pet.

Go any route you want, you can even make it sexual if you want, just be you.
No rules on anything, go wild.
